meta.content: Bangladesh Parkour Association | National Governing Body of Parkour
Bangladesh Parkour Association (BPA) - The National Governing Body of Parkour in Bangladesh. Build Confidence. Overcome Challenge. Take Opportunity.
Bangladesh Parkour Association - Build Confidence. Overcome Challenge. Take Opportunity.
meta.name: twitter:description

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting:
Build Confidence. Overcome Challenge. Take Opportunity.

Find Out More

The National Governing Body of Parkour in Bangladesh

Learn More

The Dhaka Project

Documenting the journey of Bangladesh's top traceurs.

Watch Now

a.p: Find out everything you need to know about parkour and who it is for. Bangladesh's youth have been practicing this discipline since it began in the parks of Dhaka.
Discover the basics of parkour and learn about how to get started as a beginner in Bangladesh's growing parkour community.
Join local parkour classes and get involved with the community across Dhaka, Chattogram, Sylhet and beyond.

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting:
About Bangladesh Parkour Association

Bangladesh Parkour Association (BPA) is the official organization dedicated to the growth and development of Parkour and Freerunning in Bangladesh. Founded with the vision of building a strong movement community, BPA works to inspire youth through discipline, creativity, fitness, and self-improvement.

The association promotes safe training, athlete development, community events, workshops, competitions, media production, and international collaboration within the global Parkour scene. BPA aims to create opportunities for talented athletes and content creators while spreading awareness about the positive impact of movement culture across Bangladesh.

Through training sessions, performances, social media content, and public engagement, Bangladesh Parkour Association continues to empower the next generation of traceurs and freerunners to push beyond limits, both physically and mentally.

Read More

div.p: To develop and promote Parkour and Freerunning in Bangladesh through education, training, community building, and creative expression.
To establish Bangladesh as a recognized and respected hub for Parkour and movement culture in South Asia.
Bangladesh Parkour Association runs a wide range of activities to grow the parkour and freerunning community across Bangladesh.
Regular structured training for beginners to advanced athletes.
Skill-building workshops and community gatherings throughout the year.
Support pathway for emerging traceurs and freerunners.
Producing videos, documentaries, and social content showcasing BD parkour.
Outreach programs in schools, parks, and youth communities.
Working with global parkour bodies and visiting athletes.
Our Media Hub features blogs, videos and stories from the BPA community. Explore tips, athlete features, and movement culture from across Bangladesh.

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting:
The Dhaka Project

Dhaka has become home to a new generation of Bangladeshi parkour athletes. Bangladesh Parkour Association documents the journey of our top traceurs as they tackle iconic urban training spots from Chandrima Uddan to Hatirjheel and beyond. Featuring founding members and rising stars exploring how they tackle fear and progress our sport in South Asia. Click the video to watch, or visit our YouTube channel for more BPA content.

Visit Our YouTube Channel

a.p: Open community parkour jam at Chandrima Uddan. All skill levels welcome.
Get certified as a parkour coach with the National Governing Body of Bangladesh.
The inaugural national championship - Speed, Skill and Style competition.
Beginner-friendly workshop designed for women in Bangladesh.

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting:
Be Part of Our Movement

Subscribe to the BPA newsletter for updates on training sessions, upcoming events, coaching courses, and the work we do to grow parkour and freerunning across Bangladesh and beyond.

div.p: By subscribing to our newsletter, you agree to receive email updates from Bangladesh Parkour Association. We respect your privacy and you can unsubscribe at any time.

div.div:
Bangladesh
Parkour AssociationEST. 2026 • National Governing Body
